verses.1: In that day, this song will be sung in the land of Judah:
verses.2: Open the gates, that the righteous nation may enter:
verses.3: You will keep whoever’s mind is steadfast in perfect peace,
verses.5: For he has brought down those who dwell on high, the lofty city.
verses.6: The foot shall tread it down,
verses.7: The way of the just is uprightness.
verses.8: Yes, in the way of your judgments, LORD, we have waited for you.
verses.9: With my soul I have desired you in the night.
verses.10: Let favor be shown to the wicked,
verses.11: LORD, your hand is lifted up, yet they don’t see;
verses.12: LORD, you will ordain peace for us,
verses.13: LORD our God, other lords besides you have had dominion over us,
verses.15: You have increased the nation, O LORD.
verses.16: LORD, in trouble they have visited you.
verses.17: Just as a woman with child, who draws near the time of her delivery,
verses.20: Come, my people, enter into your rooms,
verses.21: For, behold, the LORD comes out of his place to punish the inhabitants of the earth for their iniquity.
